title: payment_sessions SQLite table in wallet DB
description: Create nie-wallet/src/db.rs with a WalletStore struct (similar to relay/src/store.rs pattern). Open/create SQLite at wallet-data-dir/wallet.db. Create payment_sessions table: session_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, peer_pub_id TEXT NOT NULL, role TEXT NOT NULL (payer|payee), state TEXT NOT NULL, chain TEXT NOT NULL, amount_zatoshi INTEGER NOT NULL, tx_hash TEXT, address TEXT, created_at INTEGER NOT NULL, updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL. Use Unix timestamps (i64) to avoid SQLite datetime format pitfalls. Expose upsert_session(PaymentSession) and all_sessions() -> Vec<PaymentSession>.
